title: Bayezid II takes the throne - the shift from conquest to consolidation
Sephardic Jews expelled from Spain are welcomed into the empire
Selim I 'the Grim' seizes power and turns the empire east
Battle of Chaldiran - Ottomans crush the Safavids, opening a lasting rivalry
Mamluks defeated - the sultan claims the Caliphate of Islam
Suleiman the Magnificent begins the golden age
Battle of Mohacs - Hungarian independence ends
Siege of Vienna - the farthest reach of Ottoman expansion in Europe
Suleiman dies at Szigetvar, closing the golden age
